name: LL — WF2 Proactive Payment Reminders v2.1 (Multi-Client)

nodes.name: Schedule: 9 AM ET Mon–Fri
nodes.notes: CRON 0 14 * * 1-5 = 14:00 UTC = 9:00 AM ET (UTC-5 winter / UTC-4 summer — adjust to 0 13 * * 1-5 during DST if needed). All QB calls route to SANDBOX until environment=production is set in the master config sheet.

nodes.name: Read Client_Master_Config
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace YOUR_MASTER_CONFIG_SHEET_ID with the actual document ID of your master config sheet.

nodes.name: Loop: Process Each Client
nodes.notes: Output 0 (loop) → Get OAuth Credentials. Output 1 (done) → leave empty or connect to a final summary node.

nodes.name: Is Token Fresh?
nodes.notes: TRUE = token valid for >2 more minutes → skip refresh. FALSE = expired or expiring → refresh.

nodes.name: Refresh Access Token
nodes.notes: Basic auth credential uses the client's qb_oauth_basic_auth value (Base64 of clientId:clientSecret). Create one httpBasicAuth credential per QB app (not per client).

nodes.name: Merge Config + Token
nodes.notes: Reference in all downstream nodes: $('Merge Config + Token').first().json.authorization_header, .qb_realm_id, .qb_base_url, .slack_ar_channel_id, etc.

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: SELECT * FROM Invoice WHERE Balance > '0' AND DueDate < '{{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}' MAXRESULTS 100

nodes.name: Get Unpaid Invoices from QB
nodes.notes: Queries all invoices with Balance > 0 and DueDate before today. QB Query does not support OR — use single WHERE condition only.

nodes.name: Has Unpaid Invoices?
nodes.notes: TRUE (output 0) = invoices found → Extract Invoice Data. FALSE (output 1) = no invoices → skip to next client (loop back).

nodes.name: Load Pilot Customer List
nodes.notes: Sheet tab identified by GID. Reads customer_name column. Only customers on this list receive reminder emails.

nodes.name: Load VIP Exemption List
nodes.notes: VIP customers are exempt from automated reminders. Typically strategic accounts or customers with payment plans.

nodes.name: Has Eligible Invoices?
nodes.notes: TRUE (output 0) = send reminders. FALSE (output 1) = no eligible invoices after pilot+VIP filtering → continue to Slack AR summary.

nodes.name: Send Reminder Email (Outlook)
nodes.notes: Uses Microsoft Graph API /sendMail. Outlook OAuth2 credential must have Mail.Send scope. QB native Send Invoice Email is intentionally disabled — all customer-facing email routes through Outlook for branding control.

nodes.name: Log Reminder to Sheet
nodes.notes: appendOrUpdate with matchingColumns=[qb_invoice_id] — updates existing row if invoice was already logged, appends otherwise. Uses defineBelow mode (NEVER use Map Automatically for structured writes).

nodes.name: Get AR Aging Report from QB
nodes.notes: Runs regardless of whether reminders were sent. Aging report always posts to Slack as daily AR health summary.

nodes.name: Post AR Summary to Slack
nodes.notes: Uses slackOAuth2Api (bot token xoxb-). Never use slackApi (user token xoxp-) here.

nodes.name: Next Client →
nodes.notes: Connect output → Loop: Process Each Client (input, not loop output). This causes the iterator to advance.

nodes.name: Circuit Breaker Tripped?
nodes.notes: TRUE (output 0) = 3+ retries or non-retriable → log to DLQ + Slack alert. FALSE (output 1) = retry → back to Get OAuth Credentials.

main.node: Get AR Aging Report from QB
Get AR Aging Report from QB
Get AR Aging Report from QB

meta.notes: WF2 v2.1 — Multi-client proactive payment reminders. SETUP CHECKLIST: 1) Import this workflow. 2) In 'Read Client_Master_Config' replace YOUR_MASTER_CONFIG_SHEET_ID and Google Sheets credential. 3) Replace all REPLACE_WITH_* credential IDs. 4) Set active=true in master config sheet for each live client. 5) Set environment=production in config ONLY when a client's production QB credentials are confirmed — all other clients remain on sandbox. 6) Activate the workflow. REMOVED: QB native 'Send Invoice Email' node — all customer email routes through Outlook/Graph API for branding control. TIMEZONE: Cron 0 14 * * 1-5 = 9 AM ET (UTC-5). Change to 0 13 * * 1-5 during EDT (UTC-4) if n8n does not auto-adjust.
